--- Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 48/67
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 15] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 22 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 26/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 26/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18

→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Metallic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: -12/67
